title: salix × merxmuellerii
intro: Salix × merxmuellerii, also known as the Müller's willow or Merxmueller's willow, is a hybrid species of willow that is a cross between Salix purpurea and Salix caprea. The bark of this plant contains salicin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it a potential source of medicinal relief for various health issues. The health benefits of Salix × merxmuellerii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to help with fever reduction and the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the bark of this plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves that can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including arthritis and colds.
